title: Static search without servers
body: Rangefind builds a static inverted index that can be hosted on GitHub Pages, Netlify, or any host with byte range support.

title: Range-packed term shards
body: Logical term shards are compressed independently and packed into large static files. The browser fetches only the byte ranges needed for a query.

title: Facet and numeric filters
body: Facet values and numeric fields are stored in a compact code table so filtered searches can run in the browser without a database.

title: Search quality benchmarks
body: A useful static search project should report quality, transfer size, request count, build time, and ranking disagreements.

title: Pagefind comparison notes
body: Pagefind is a strong static search baseline. Rangefind explores range-addressed indexes and schema-driven retrieval for larger collections.
